evals.prompt: I want to track which environment a bug was found in. Should that be a label or a property?
evals.expected_output: Recommends a select-type custom property scoped to the Bug work item type, with options prod/staging/dev.
expectations: Identifies this as structured queryable data → property
Recommends select type with fixed options
Scopes the property to the Bug work item type
Mentions filtering and reporting use cases

evals.prompt: Our label list has 80 entries and nobody can find anything. Help.
evals.expected_output: Quarterly taxonomy audit: drop labels with <3 uses, introduce prefixed namespaces, merge near-duplicates.
expectations: Recommends prefixed namespaces (type/, area/, priority/, status/)

evals.prompt: Design a state machine for our support team in Plane.
evals.expected_output: Recommends the support/triage state set: New → Triaged/Needs Info → In Progress/Waiting on Customer → Resolved | Closed.
expectations: Maps states to the correct Plane state groups

evals.prompt: Should I create a custom work item type for Spikes or just use a label type/spike?
evals.expected_output: Use a work item type — Spikes have different fields (timebox), different velocity treatment (no points), and different default state.
expectations: Identifies that workflow differs (timebox, no points)
Recommends a work item type, not a label
Suggests pairing with a timebox property
Warns about staying under 6 types total
